Mudra Interactive Template

Baseline: connection-safe, multi-signal telemetry, and device-free interaction fallback.

Interaction Stage

Drag or use keyboard fallback when no device is connected.

pointer mode

released

Nav Direction

Battery

Fallback Controls

Space: tap gesture | Shift hold: button press/release | [ and ]: pressure down/up | Arrow keys: pointer/direction/tilt based on mode
